title: Remote Control Contents
description:
Remote Control Contents

Remote Control

By using Input/Output, Ethernet (TCP/IP), and RS-232C, the controller can control manipulators from an external device.

The external device can execute several commands, including Motor On/Off, Start, Pause, Continue, and Stop.

For details on extended function of the remote I/O, refer to Epson RC+ 8.0 Remote Control Reference manual.
